description: Verified header links on mobile viewport; navigation to '/contact' failed due to a typo in the href ('/contcat'), and no link labeled 'Home' was found (the logo 'okwasniewski' links to '/').

issues.name: Contact link points to wrong route /contcat
issues.description: Expected: The "contact" link should point to "/contact". Actual: The link labeled "contact" in the header points to "/contcat", which results in a 404 error page.
reproductionSteps: Locate the "contact" link in the header
Click the link and observe a 404 page
issues.actualBehavior: The link labeled "contact" in the header points to "/contcat", which results in a 404 error page.

issues.name: Home link label is missing in header
issues.description: Expected: A link labeled "Home" pointing to "/" should be present in the header as per the requirements. Actual: The header link pointing to "/" is labeled "okwasniewski", but no link with the text "Home" is present in the header.
reproductionSteps: Examine header links for the text "Home"
Observe that the logo "okwasniewski" links to "/", but no link is labeled "Home"
issues.expectedBehavior: A link labeled "Home" pointing to "/" should be present in the header as per the requirements.
issues.actualBehavior: The header link pointing to "/" is labeled "okwasniewski", but no link with the text "Home" is present in the header.
